page_content:
Credit Only Granted for: BSCI452, BIOL708E, or NACS728N.

BSC1453 Biology of Hearing (3 Credits)

Acoustic and neural basis of hearing. The auditory system will be described with a comparative approach across species. Prerequisite: Minimum grade of C- in BSCI207 or NEUR200. Recommended: BSC1I353 or NEUR306.
